## Validation

- [ ] `python3 tests/validate_skill.py`
- [ ] `python3 tests/evaluate_response.py black-box-layoffs tests/fixtures/black-box-layoffs-pass.txt`
- [ ] Manual scenario review if skill behavior changed

## Magnifica Humanitas check

- [ ] Human dignity remains central
- [ ] Recourse, transparency, and human responsibility are preserved
- [ ] Truth, work, freedom, peace, and the vulnerable are considered
- [ ] New or changed behavior has an example or scenario
